calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-21-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as a reassignment from the Presiding Judge's Department for court trial:
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, and CSR: Brenda Fields
Nasir Patel for Plaintiff in pro per.
Defendant Shelliynin Wright appeared in pro per.
No appearance by Defendant Jeff D. Kendrick.
10:00 AM: Opening statement by plaintiff Mr. Patel, testimony and evidence presented.
Exhibit 1: 3-day notice and proof of service...ID/EVID
10:10 AM: Answers by defendant
After hearing testimony and evidence presented by defendant, the matter is submitted.
The court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants, Shelliynin Wright and Jeff Kendrick for restitution and possession located at 554 Broadway, Room #19, San Francisco, CA
Money judgment of $4,140.00 for back rent and per diem damages
Costs of $120.00
Plaintiff to prepare judgment; Plaintiff stipulated in court for return of exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2003 Continued To Aug-18-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ: Irving Pfeffer, Clerk:M. Vallejo, Not reported.
Appearances:
Nasir Patel, Plaintiff present in pro per
Defendants: Jeff D. Kendrick and Shelli Lynn, were not present when the case was called.
Jury demand is Striken and case is set for Court Trial.
Defendant: Shelli Lynn, came late and was told to appear on Monday for Ct. Trial.
